content.text:
{
  "dimension": "coaching-stance",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach is clearly operating from VIEW throughout. Impartiality is the strongest signal: when the client says 'we got to hold off on the insights' at turn 13, the coach simply says 'Okay' at turn 14 — no defense, no explanation, no attachment to being right. Empathy is genuine and unperformed at turn 22 ('I'm sorry. I'm just sorry that that's the case for you.') — sat with, not coached around. Vulnerability appears in turn 30 with personal pattern-recognition disclosure offered as solidarity rather than authority. Wonder is concrete and present-moment ('Are you enjoying saying that?' / 'how would you NOT enjoy your shame?') rather than investigative or strategic. The coach refuses to chase the future-fix frame the client offers, which would only be possible from a non-agenda stance. Pace mismatches client's rush deliberately (slowing into 'right now' moves). No filler validation, no preacher-mode, no need for the client to land anywhere.",
  "evidence_turns": [4, 8, 14, 22, 26, 30, 34, 36],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "'How about right now?' — wonder pointed at present, no agenda to fix the future-postponement frame."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the said vs the shown ('big smile... head is confused') from observation, not interpretation. Holds the client without pushing."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "'Okay.' Receives the calibration without defense. Signature undefended stance — no need to be right or look like a good coach."},
    {"turn": 22, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Genuine empathy, unperformed. Doesn't coach the pain, just meets it."},
    {"turn": 26, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "'You're a victim, bro.' Willing to say the thing the client doesn't want to hear without flinching — impartial, not invested in client's preferred self-image."},
    {"turn": 30, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "First-person disclosure offered as solidarity and pattern-recognition, not as authority or advice."},
    {"turn": 34, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Wonder applied at shame itself, not at getting rid of it. No transformation agenda."},
    {"turn": 36, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Inversion question shows curiosity about the actual mechanism in front of the coach rather than steering toward an outcome."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["frame-it-as-an-experiment", "follow-wonder-flag-the-deflection", "treat-yourself-as-actor-of-emotion", "shame-as-disconnection", "feel-your-way-to-freedom", "are-you-bracing-or-embracing"],
  "expected_territory_misses": [],
  "notes": "Strong example of refusal-to-transform. The 'Okay' at turn 14 is the diagnostic moment for VIEW — only a coach without agenda can receive that pushback cleanly."
}
